payload.answer: I can’t remember “everything about AI” as a durable memory. Please provide a specific fact, preference, project detail, or instruction you want saved.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is too broad and does not contain a specific durable personal fact, preference, relationship, or user-specific information to store.

details: No memory was saved because the request was overly broad and not user-specific.

repair_options: Specify a personal preference, e.g. “Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI topics.”
Specify a project context, e.g. “Remember that I’m researching AI safety for my thesis.”
Specify a recurring instruction, e.g. “Remember to explain AI concepts with practical examples.”
